race.comment: ANGELS FURY (2) looks the one to beat. She was a big spruik on debut, backed into $1.70 in the G3 Blue Diamond Preview when pulling up with issues, resuming with a soft maiden win at Bendigo as favourite. Looks likeliest to make that next step. PORTINARI (15) had no hope here first up behind Lucky Brook when a mile back. She got home well after being held up and up to 1100m should suit much better. EILISH (9) ran a good race on debut at Bendigo in solid time behind a smart one in Sharaz. They put a gap on third and she can improve, respecting. EGYPTIAN DANCER (6) was second to Lucky Brook first up and has claims again.
